prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a young woman in a Japanese school uniform standing in profile on a bright urban sidewalk during daytime. She has light ash-blonde shoulder-length straight hair with soft layers and side part, a small stud earring, and a slim build. Her face is intentionally covered by a plain opaque square censor block in a muted skin-tone brown, centered over the entire face with sharp edges and no texture. She wears a crisp short-sleeve white button-up school shirt, a loosely hanging deep red necktie, and a high-waisted navy blue pleated mini skirt. Pose her side-on, torso turned slightly toward camera, one arm relaxed down, walking or pausing naturally. Use a shallow depth of field with a creamy bokeh background: sunlit Japanese city street, pale pavement, blurred storefronts and buildings on both sides, a blue road sign in the upper right distance, warm natural light, soft highlights on hair and clothing. Full body from head to mid-thigh/knees, centered composition, realistic skin, fabric folds, and lens blur, like a high-quality outdoor fashion photo shot on an 85mm lens.
